title: cirsium × soubiellei
intro: Cirsium × soubiellei, also known as Soubie's thistle, is a hybrid plant species in the sunflower family (Asteraceae), resulting from the cross between Cirsium bulbmosum and Cirsium pannonicum. The plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Cirsium × soubiellei include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as potentially alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
